chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 571 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of CMA No. 2771/24. 2. For hearing of main case. 19.02.2026 Mr. Abdul Moiz Jaferi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Zakir, Advocate for the Respondents. Sardar Zafar Hussian, Advocate for the Respondents. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG. ---------- Mr. Abdul Moiz Jaferi, Advocate files his Vakalatnama in the matter and seeks that the Petition be disposed of in terms of the Order dated 26.02.2025 made by a learned Division Bench of this Court in C.P No. D- 5737/2023 and other connected cases. Learned counsel appearing on behalf of the department do not oppose such submission. As such, by consent, the Petition stands disposed of accordingly in light of the aforementioned order, which shall apply mutatis mutandis to the matter at hand. Judge Judge Ayaz sad
